title: Ennead
content:
{{Top|leg}}
An '''ennead''' was a military unit used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. At the [[Battle of Ithor]], [[Shedao Shai]] marched with an ennead toward the temporary base used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The three squads of a [[Triad (unit)/Legends|triad]] moved on either side and at the front of the group.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]''
